postmanEvidence: Postman Desktop 11.71.7 packages postman-sandbox@6.2.2 and the listed bundled library versions.
The audited postman-sandbox bootcode exposes the bundled package specifiers and Browserify module shims recorded in this artifact.

postmeterImplementation.packageLoading: PostMeter executes the generated postman-sandbox browser bootcode inside the request-script VM with Browserify entry modules disabled, captures its internal require function, restores PostMeter's allowlisted require, and exposes only normalized bundled package names through the existing package policy.
postmeterImplementation.hostAccess: The bootcode is installed with ambient require hidden, process/globalThis/WebAssembly absent, and temporary File support restored after package loading. Scripts still cannot require host Node modules, node: specifiers, paths, URLs, registries, native modules, fs, process, Electron, renderer APIs, or shell handles.
postmeterImplementation.subsetBoundaries: stream and timers remain PostMeter script-safe facades. timers is brokered through PostMeter's async tracker; stream is a bounded EventEmitter/PassThrough-compatible facade. The raw Browserify stream/timers shims assume ambient window/timer behavior and are not exposed as direct host handles.
